research_summary.city_summary: Large, transit-heavy city where neighborhood clustering matters more than straight-line distance.
research_summary.seasonal_context: Spring shoulder season context with variable temperatures and moderate daylight.
transport_notes: Rail is usually the fastest option.
Plan by district to avoid excessive transfers.
budget_notes: Use one paid anchor attraction per day to keep spending predictable.
Cluster meals and major attractions by neighborhood to reduce transport waste.

places.name: Senso-ji
places.general_description: Historic temple area that works well as an early-day cultural stop.

places.name: Shibuya
places.general_description: High-energy area suited to nightlife, shopping, and city atmosphere.

places.name: Meiji Shrine
places.general_description: Quiet shrine precinct that balances busier urban districts nearby.

recommended_apps.name: Google Maps
recommended_apps.reason: Strong for train timing and station exits.

recommended_apps.name: Tabelog
recommended_apps.reason: Useful for restaurant rankings in Japan.

recommended_apps.name: Klook
recommended_apps.reason: Good for attraction and transport bookings.

warnings: Opening hours and event listings are not yet connected to live providers.
Weather is seasonal guidance, not a live forecast.

media_scenes.title: Morning at Senso-ji
media_scenes.prompt: A photorealistic premium travel scene in Tokyo featuring Senso-ji in Asakusa during the 09:00 to 11:30 part of the itinerary. Reflect a balanced trip style, spring shoulder season context with variable temperatures and moderate daylight. Show realistic crowd density, subtle local atmosphere, and activities connected to food, culture.
style_rules: Photorealistic travel photography with cinematic composition.
Keep landmarks geographically plausible and avoid fantasy elements.
Show season, weather, time of day, and crowd level consistent with the itinerary context.
Use natural lighting and a premium editorial travel aesthetic.
Do not include text overlays, logos, watermarks, or collage layouts.
